statement: The tool is SCREENING-level, not regulatory-precision: the worst-case out-of-sample grain miss (PFOS endosperm, ~5x) exceeds a factor 3 (log10 > 0.5), so dietary use must carry congener-specific uncertainty factors.

confidence.basis: threshold rule: statistic 'point'=0.7 > 0.5 is met (combine='latest', margin=0.2)
